title: Chapter 446 – Sunset Flag (8)
content:
Celestial Aid Demon Star Huo Lian Da Xiao desperately reached out to the side.

Fortunately, his second technique had fully activated. From within the bosom of the headless Celestial Star, dozens of sheets of Locust Yellow Paper and a small yellow jade bead were drawn forth.

Midair manipulation of objects, vastly amplified by the mysteries of martial sorcery. With the flutter of rustling paper, the bundle of Locust Yellow Papers and the yellow orb sailed into Huo Lian Da Xiao's arms in quick succession.

Among them, the yellow jade hummed in resonance with the red jade he already carried, vibrating with a low thrum.

Spirit weapons.

These were treasures imbued with spirituality. The world-spanning energy waves of the Taimo Mountain Castle Lord, slumbering within the two jade beads, surged through his mind.

-No matter what calamity befalls you, you shall return safely once.

The intent contained within the jade beads.

'Good...!'

Whoooosh!

Moments later, he retreated through the air a distance of over thirty jang.

A life-saving martial sorcery technique that, while limited in speed, could even mimic the form of Kunlun Sect's Cloud Dragon Great Eight Form.

Fortunately, this technique also executed properly. Because Lotus Nezha Lightning Genius appeared lost in some contemplation and wasn't paying attention to him, Huo Lian Da Xiao managed to secure a moment's reprieve.

That was the extent of his luck.

Huo Lian Da Xiao began to review what had just occurred.

'What was that?'

His energy flow had been severed--temporarily, but completely.

More precisely, the entire process of twisting the harmony of heaven and earth through force had been blocked.

Unlike conventional martial arts, the energy waves of martial sorcery required elaborate manipulation of true energy outside the body. All of it had been hopelessly tangled. Though the disruption lasted only an instant, everything before him had gone blank.

'Now I understand why martial artists who lose their lower dantian choose suicide.'

Despite cultivating equanimity for decades, Huo Lian Da Xiao never wanted to experience such a thing again.

As a practitioner of martial sorcery who had lived a long life, he needed countermeasures--even if it meant combing through every scrap of knowledge and experience he had accumulated.

Kiiiing!

Blue light flashed from his eyes. The Penetrating Intent True Formula of Taimo Mountain Castle's secret teachings. He activated the upper dantian martial art that accelerated the flow of thought to an entirely different level.

While Huo Lian Da Xiao was thus preoccupied with analyzing the newly appointed Purple Rank's technique--

Yue Shou-lin, having completely shaken off the flames that Celestial Star had ignited, looked up at Jeong Yeon-shin from the ground. Her face was colored with concern unlike anything she had shown before.

"Why did you come? You should have rested longer."

Only after she addressed him in a clear voice did Jeong Yeon-shin slowly part his lips, which had seemed as though they would remain sealed indefinitely.

"...It was long enough."

"Two days was long enough?"

"It's not as if someone died--I can't seclude myself for three days. Especially not when I have to stand in for Divine Sword Group Leader Yong."

Despite his expressionless face, his words were unusually lengthy. The first syllable of his reply carried a slight edge.

Moments later, Yue Shou-lin caught with one hand the spear that Jeong Yeon-shin had pulled from Celestial Star's abdomen and thrown to her.

At that moment, the old master's headless body collided with the ground with a dull thud. Blood gushed forth, dyeing the dirt a deep crimson.

The dozens of Martial Alliance masters standing around could not hide their shock.

Yue Shou-lin paid no attention to their reactions. She merely gazed at her young junior--now her superior--then opened her mouth again.

"I'll take care of this. I wasn't being defeated."

"I know."

"Right--you could see through the World Tree? That's why you arrived at such a timely moment."

A conversation between the leaders of Desolate Fortress.

They were discussing something beyond common sense--a conversation that made even practitioners of martial sorcery prick up their ears.

'World Tree...!'

While still analyzing the newly appointed Purple Rank's technique, Huo Lian Da Xiao's eyelids lifted high as he listened to their exchange.

Beneath them, his feverish eyes trembled.

[Did you just say World Tree? Do you truly know how to use the trunk of the World Tree? This Huo Lian cannot comprehend how such a thing could be permitted to someone outside the elf clan. If you would grant me but a sip of conversation, I am willing to answer anything--from why the Sword Star of the martial world has become a walking corpse, to what is happening in Hangzhou these days, to why the Heaven Conquering Sect Leader agreed to join our castle's cultivation graduation proposal...]

He was one of the Three Arts Grand Seats of Taimo Mountain Castle. Rarely in his life had he needed to suppress his curiosity.

Moreover, having secured his safety by gathering two of his sect's three treasures into his embrace, there was no reason to be overly cautious with the newly appointed Purple Rank and Desolate Divine Spear.

"......"

That was until Lotus Nezha's clear eyes shifted to him.

[...Oh dear.]

The upper dantian of Huo Lian Da Xiao rang alarm bells.

The intuition that this person did not view him as human penetrated from his skull to the marrow of his bones.

There was no room for negotiation.

'Even the demonic masters of bygone eras would not have treated people this way.'

It was then.

The sword carrying the newly appointed Purple Rank slid toward him.

Like the Taoist immortal Lu Dongbin among the Eight Immortals.

He resembled the legendary Sword Immortal, slowly traversing the air while standing atop a pristine divine sword.

Lotus Nezha was also an exceptional practitioner of fist techniques. He could likely perform acrobatics in midair, using mind-controlled sword and life-saving techniques to slay enemies from above.

Huo Lian Da Xiao made his decision.

'I shall retreat with my body intact.'

It was entirely possible. This would hold true even if he were facing the Divine Sword Group Leader rather than the newly appointed Purple Rank.

He had two treasures that augmented martial sorcery--gifts from the "Enlightened One," the Taimo Mountain Castle Lord. These were sect treasures that would be difficult to recreate.

At this moment, the jade beads in his hands would permit the execution of techniques far beyond his normal attainment.

With two treasures, they were essentially two expendable trump cards.

Huo Lian Da Xiao poured everything into a single execution.

Woooong-!

The red and yellow jades in his left hand erupted with turbid waves. The two treasures continuously spewed translucent concentric shockwaves, instantly completing a single sorcery formula.

With that, the priceless treasures spontaneously shattered to pieces.

[Form Shifting Void.]

With a brief incantation, Huo Lian Da Xiao's body began to blur like smoke.

His right hand was not idle either. While crumpling the bundle of Locust Yellow Papers in his grip, he formed a hand seal characteristic of martial sorcery.

Similar to a sword seal, he straightened his index and middle fingers while bringing together the tips of his remaining three fingers.

A hand shape that guided internal energy into a specific flow. The sky responded to that lightning-quick movement.

[Nine Veneration Divine Technique.]

The air flashed white, then dropped a blue lightning bolt toward Jeong Yeon-shin, who had already reached his vicinity.

[Lightning Strike.]

Bzzzzzzzzt-!

It was enormously thick.

A bluish beam of light struck down at Jeong Yeon-shin, spreading blue branches in every direction.

Boom!

The air brightened brilliantly.

The lightning crackled, roughly scraping the atmosphere. The Hanzhong Martial Alliance warriors on the ground scattered in all directions with swift life-saving techniques.

Even in the midst of this, they looked up at the sky where the two were confronting each other, their expressions strained with worry. Only Desolate Divine Spear Yue Shou-lin stood in place with her arms crossed.

[Composure. The privilege of the strong. Someone of the Purple Rank should be capable of harboring it.]

Huo Lian Da Xiao glanced at his own hands and feet, which were gradually blurring, and smiled faintly.

[In any case, thanks to your generous hesitation, this body is escaping to Hangzhou with all limbs intact. Though I have suffered great losses and feel some regret, I should thank you for broadening my knowledge...]

He could not finish.

A whitish mass of light spread out from within the pillar of deep blue lightning.

Within it, a figure seemingly made of starlight flickered, then instantly resolved into the form of Jeong Yeon-shin, breaking through the lightning.

Even at this moment, the newly appointed Purple Rank showed no change in expression whatsoever. He was utterly indifferent.

'Did he block it with protective energy?'

Huo Lian Da Xiao's blue eyes flickered like candle flames.

Lotus Nezha Lightning Genius.

His guess that the technique which had initially interfered with martial sorcery could not be used multiple times proved correct.

After all, every subsequent sorcery technique had activated normally. Even the lightning bolt had struck down properly.

'Nevertheless, this is a matter to consult the Castle Lord about. He's dangerous.'

Those known as supreme masters in the martial world.

Though they are said to each possess different studies and display all manner of strange martial arts, the technique the newly appointed Purple Rank had displayed earlier was uniquely lethal.

This was especially true for Taimo Mountain Castle, which aspired someday to claim the title of the world's finest through its profound studies. Both the Castle Lord and Young Castle Lord, already in Hangzhou, needed to know.

"......"

Huo Lian Da Xiao stared intently at Jeong Yeon-shin, who was now meeting his gaze at close range. This was to observe the temperament of the newly appointed Purple Rank.

There was some anxiety about the disruption of his sorcery.

But Form Shifting Void was a technique of an entirely different caliber.

The ultimate evasion technique that blurred one's physical form like a specter, followed by the space-rupturing capability of the earth-shrinking technique.

From the beginning, such a complex formula and energy wave could not be completed by a single person's power alone. It required treasures that could not be bought even with gold.

It was clearly a technique beyond the human realm. With human senses, it was impossible to interfere with such high-dimensional energy waves.

'Even if he is Lotus Nezha, there's no way he can do anything about Form Shifting Void once it's activated...'

At that moment.

Jeong Yeon-shin, who had been silently watching the gradually fading Huo Lian Da Xiao, extended his hand.

Swoosh.

He placed it on Huo Lian Da Xiao's face. As if trying to grasp the head of a man who had already lost his form like a ghost.

Jeong Yeon-shin slowly moved his lips.

"Leave it behind."

A voice without inflection.

[......!]

The eyes of the Three Arts Grand Seat of Taimo Mountain Castle widened to the point of tearing.

Something that should not have happened occurred. As reported about his metamorphosis, the sensation of a smooth hand was suddenly, impossibly felt.

At this moment, a somewhat rough warmth radiated from the hand that was completely grasping Huo Lian Da Xiao's face.

It was true energy bolstering Jeong Yeon-shin's grip.

"No...!"

Just as Huo Lian Da Xiao, whose face had become visible again, cried out in desperation, the Form Shifting Void he had activated earlier completed its execution.

Woooosh-!

The body clad in a black robe rapidly dispersed.

Not so with the head. There was a sound of fabric tearing. While his body vanished to Hangzhou, his face--caught by Jeong Yeon-shin--had to remain where it was, mouth still flapping uselessly.

His cheek flesh, quivering and convulsing, pressed against unyielding fingers.

Eventually.

Blood dripped to the ground. At this moment, the Castle Lord and Young Castle Lord of Taimo Mountain Castle would be witnessing the headless return of Celestial Aid Demon Star.

Jeong Yeon-shin calmly released his grip.

Thud.

Huo Lian Da Xiao's head rolled across the lightning-scorched earth.

"......"

The Martial Alliance masters who had witnessed this closed their mouths one by one. Not a single person could readily speak.

The reaction of martial artists who had witnessed a confrontation so transcendent as to seem simple was just like that.

The annihilation of the Three Arts Grand Seats of Taimo Mountain Castle.

Celestial Aid Demon Star and Celestial Star died in the same place.

Celestial Demon Star, who had been the other pillar of the Three Arts Grand Seats, after assisting Yu Ling's Heavenly Net, was ultimately slain by Divine Sword Group Leader Yong Hye-myeong.

What was once rare now happened openly.

These were times of upheaval.

Now no major faction paid attention to others.

They acted without considering joint actions like alliances or unions.

At this moment, the blood dripping from the newly appointed Purple Rank's hand revealed the flow of the times.

On the ground where the battle had taken place.

The expressions of Zhuge Qing-ya and Gong Min were unusually aligned. Their throats worked as they swallowed dry saliva.

"You look healthy."

Jeong Yeon-shin, having examined the two of them, spoke softly. Then he looked at the coffin loaded on the cart for a long while.

"...You may bring it to the main fortress. I will welcome you as honored guests."

Only after hearing those words could Zhuge Qing-ya take a step.

Shuffle.

"Group Leader, I offer my congratulations. It's been a long time since we last met."

"Congratulations?"

Jeong Yeon-shin asked as if he had heard something unexpected.

Inwardly, he was blaming himself. Despite approaching the battle with considerable calm, he had been forced to kill the practitioners of martial sorcery. It would have been better to capture them alive.

His skill was insufficient.

Among the three Purple Ranks, Yong Hye-myeong would have been able to capture them alive. The remaining one would have been unable to do so for reasons entirely different from Jeong Yeon-shin's.

'But I've got the feel of it now.'

Jeong Yeon-shin clenched and unclenched his hand. He could feel the ticklish breath of the Desolate Fortress Lord who had once taught him the Mind Sword.

"What congratulations? Child of the Zhuge family--our new Purple Rank has yet to hold his formal promotion ceremony."

"What...?"

"He's currently locked in a power struggle with King Qiong-ming."

A figure mentioned who enjoys the Emperor's full favor.

A vassal king involved in all manner of major affairs in the martial world, including the founding of the Profound Martial Alliance.

As the conversation escalated endlessly, astonishment appeared on the faces of the Martial Alliance masters, including Zhuge Qing-ya, but Jeong Yeon-shin merely turned his head indifferently toward the main fortress.

"Senior Yue."

"Yes?"

"I contemplated at length. Today I wish to set out for Hangzhou."

"What about King Qiong-ming? The Elder Council Head and the Grand Administrator are just watching nervously. Right now, that man practically is the government."

"I've heard that the government should not interfere in the affairs of the martial world."

"......"

While everyone except Jeong Yeon-shin was rendered speechless, each wearing their own expression--

"I'll go ahead."

He silently flew upward, standing upon Remaining Thunder.

The divine sword that had come to symbolize Lotus Nezha emitted a resonant hum.

The sunlight that brushed around the blade refracted and bent, as if the world itself had lost its bearings.
